My consulting business will be inactive during my appointment and all outstanding client fees will be fixed before I enter government service. (2025-01-01)
Walnut Hill Medical, LLC

Pursuant to the consulting contract between Redbird Cove and Walnut Hill Medical, LLC, I will receive lump- sum, fixed cash payments of $2,980 and $3,000 from Walnut Hill Medical, LLC, as fees owed for services rendered before my appointment.  I do not have a date when those fees would be paid by. (2022-09-01)
Redbird Cove and Alio, Inc., have entered into a convertible promissory note agreement as fees owed to me for services rendered before my appointment. (2025-01-01)
